title: Pitareeze Cruiser
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Pitareeze_Cruiser_plans.jpg|250px|thumb|[[Hologram/Legends|Holographic]] plans for the cruiser]]
The '''Pitareeze Cruiser''' was a class of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that was developed by [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Pitareeze]] and his business partner, [[Olag Greck]]. However, Greck betrayed Pitareeze, stealing the plans for the Pitareeze Cruiser while the Baron slept and producing cheaper versions of the design.

When the ships became faulty, Greck kidnapped the Baron's grandson, [[Nak Pitareeze|Nak]], and forced him into making repairs. Fortunately Pitareeze's [[Droid/Legends|droids]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], were able to save the boy and foil Greck's plans. An angered Greck blamed the ship's failure on the Baron's intervention.

{{Ship-stub}}
